title: Cuneiform Tablet #0305: Old Assyrian Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
